title: Space Station Murdoku (Slalom)
rules: Place everyone on the grid according to their clue to find the murderer. He was in a region alone with the victim.
Only 1 person per row and per column.
"Beside" means in the same room and orthogonally adjacent.
clues: A (Man - Alaric). He was in Navigation and the only one sitting in a chair.
B (Woman - Bonnie). She was in the Crew Quarters and saw two different wire trails.
E (Man - Eugene). He was south of the wire, in the Navigation room.
J (Man - Julius). He was in the Medbay and saw different wires passing between each bed.
V (Man - Vernon). The victim. He was alone with the murderer.
